title: premna quadrifolia
intro: Premna quadrifolia, also known as honeywort or clock flower, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to tropical Asia and Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Premna quadrifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and treat skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis. Premna quadrifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in various herbal preparations, including salves, oils, and tinctures.
